abilities.name: Don't Turn Your Back
abilities.text: Enemy models that activate engaged with this model may not declare the Interact action until the end of their activation.

abilities.name: Farrowing
abilities.text: After this model suffers 2 or more damage, summon a Piglet into base contact with this model.

abilities.name: Thick Fat
abilities.text: When this model is dealt damage, it may remove a Glutted token to reduce the damage dealt by 2.

actions.name: Three Mouths to Feed
actions.effects: This action deals its damage three times.

triggers.name: Crunch Down
triggers.text: This model either heals 2 or gains a Glutted token.

triggers.name: Precise Strike
triggers.text: When resolving, this attack receives one additional raise.

triggers.name: Rampage
triggers.text: Move this model 5", ignoring enemy models. Models moved through this way must pass a TN 13 Sp duel or be dealt 1 damage.

actions.name: Rooting Around
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Once per activation. Target a Remains or Scheme marker.
actions.effects: Move this model up to 4" toward the target, then remove the target.

actions.name: Resupply
actions.effects: Draw up to two cards from this model's discard pile with values of 1-5.

actions.name: Grunt and Grow
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Once per activation. Friendly Piglet model with either a Glutted or Burning token only.
actions.effects: Replace the target with a Wild Boar, then remove all Glutted and Burning tokens from the target.
